thank you.
Original ideal that is fun to play

Bought this on sale, but refunding it because the app for non VR players just not working as expected. (Room is full errors, not loading, ...).
Wanted to play with this this evening with the kids, but grabbed Acron instead - again.

I love this little game. The style of it is great. Honestly, I could hang out with Dennis all day long, just to hear him speak nonsense.

The gameplay is very simple, but quickly gets hectic. I'm about 4 levels in and still really enjoying it. I have no idea how long-lasting it is, but I love it so far. I got it on sale at £4.49, which I think is a perfect price.
So when I bought this game I was expecting good multiplayer from the description of the game. When I tried multiplayer all my friends could do was throw a few burgers and very rarely spawn a zombie!

reviews.review_title: Game not fun I need a refund
reviews.review_description: Ew

i’ve been trying to play with my family but can’t find the mobile app anywhere ? what do i have to download, other than that the game is overall fun i just wish i could play with my family it’d make it more fun
I’m not super happy with the gameplay. It’s fun, good graphics, feels good to play etc etc, just not for me. I can see someone else enjoying this though.

So I originally thought this game was going to be a lot worse (based on the graphics and simple gameplay). I enjoyed myself more than I thought I would.
One of this things I didn't enjoy was the PC/Mobile app. This game is pretty heavily reliant on it's multiplayer and quite frankly I thinks its the worst aspect of the game. There is a severe lack of interactivity between the VR player and the non VR player. Firstly the app is stupid simple (There's only about four buttons) and basically that's all there is to it. The main objective on the pc/mobile side is to click the buttons as fast as possible which is fun for a few minutes, after that it started to get boring. You should be able to control the enemies you plant down like in acron attack of the squirrels! If you wanted to play with one other person it's so stupid easy to beat them. If you can look past the online side of things get the game! It's stupid fun and silly!

reviews.review_title: For those that love to be in control
reviews.review_description:
Most job simulator experiences in VR are based around the kitchen, Traffic Jams is perfect for someone who is a bit of a control freak. You get to boss around pedestrians and drivers, all, allegedly with a view of keeping everyone safe.

The game takes place on a busy road junctions in one of a number of Cities around the world such as Paris, Tokyo, New York and Amsterdam. Each location opens up as you progress through the game in two versions, Day or Night time. The junctions are beautifully drawn, being colourful cartoon representations of each area.

The game itself starts things off nice and easy,  simply point at the person or vehicle with one hand, stop or wave them on with the other. Each level has a number of challenges to complete, completing them then allows other locations or night time versions to be opened. These challenges could simply be score based, spotting and hitting your mentor Denis or running over zombies.

The bigger the cities, the larger the junction, the more hectic the traffic control becomes, drivers or pedestrians will become impatient and angry if left for too long and likely cause an accident, there are great opportunities to have some chaotic fun such as running over characters, causing crashes or smashing through glass panels. 

There is an option to allow for up to 4 persons play against you using the mobile phone app where you have to try to cause crashes for the VR player, this for me as the VR player felt the weakest part of the game as I didn’t feel I had any interaction with that person only seeing 1P sign where they were on the junction.

This game is brilliant fun in VR, the main game is hectic on later levels, but the more mayhem you can cause the more fun you will have.
Really fun game to play if anyone comes over! If your lonely and have no friends and living in an apartment by yourself don’t play it also get help
I got this with Arizona sunrise pack and thought it be cool but was disappointed, the game is about guiding cars

reviews.review_title: Cannot do level 2 no traffic no people
reviews.review_description:
Hello
Can’t find anywhere any support. My kid is standing at a junction and there are no cars no traffic yet it says objectives stop two cars and crash two cars? 

He literally stands there nothing happens and says ‘this isn’t very funI’. Hello! Thx guys

developer_response.body: Hi intothebreach, it looks like he might have started up the multiplayer version of the map and accidently ticked the green tab on the side.  The tabs at the top should let him access the normal singleplayer version of the level! Hope that helps :)

reviews.review_description: This is a great game. Fun, and challenging, but I was under the impression I could participate from my computer with brother on Occulus Quest playing a few feet next to me. I go to the trafficjams.app.  It says please rotate device..... What??? I've looked everywhere of actual video evidence of someone  playing along with computer.... Dare I try  to lift & turn my monitor?

This game is incredibly fun, from the single player mode to the great multiplayer. The zombies and different events like that are a fun twist to help the levels not be so repetitive. There aren’t too many levels and although it is very good, i think it should be priced around £10.99-11.99 max instead of £14.99 as there isn’t too many levels (maybe they could add some in the future that could make it seem worth it for the price). This review wasn’t written to make it seem like a bad game because it really isn’t it is quite fun 🤩
It’s kinda hard but I’m good it it
Liked it. I just started the game and played for an hour and I can say it is good for now I can't say too much will give it 5 stars doe anyways as I really like it so far.
This game is so fun I love how everyone on devices can vote on what happens in the actual map
I mean it’s fun…. While it lasts. There are not many different levels and after you beat them it just gets a bit boring. If I were considering purchasing I would just get something else.
